coupon.source_phrase_block: Pass admits 2 people for $12 per person for general admission only. Reservations for your ticket may be made in advance by calling the museum or by going to pem.org/tickets Yin Yu Tang Chinese House and other special exhibits require additional admission fees. This is a printable pass. You will receive the pass in your email or library staff can print it for you after you have made a reservation.
